jsonLd.title: NSE is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
NSE is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
